notes: asyncio.run() wrapping verified: HandlerOnboarding.handle() correctly calls asyncio.run(handle_onboarding(input_model)) for live execution path. dry_run=True path skips asyncio.run() entirely (confirmed by test_dry_run_skips_asyncio_run). Unit test test_asyncio_run_called_with_model_onboarding_input confirms asyncio.run is invoked with coroutine. Known limitation: breaks if called from within an existing event loop (documented in handler module docstring).
